hero.title: Professional financial reports
hero.subtitle: Transform Excel files into PDF, PowerPoint and Word reports — automatically, powered by artificial intelligence.

problem.title: The problem we solve
problem.subtitle: Finance teams waste precious hours on repetitive tasks. We automate that.

problems.desc1: Manual report formatting consumes time that should be spent on strategic analysis.
problems.desc2: Copying data between tools introduces inconsistencies and hard-to-detect errors.
problems.desc3: Recreating the same layout and charts every week is tedious and unproductive.

solutions.desc1: Upload your file and the report is generated in seconds, with no manual work.
solutions.desc2: Data is processed with precision — no copy-paste errors or formatting issues.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your data into professional reports.

step1.title: Upload your file
step1.desc: Upload your Excel or CSV file to the platform.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.desc: The platform analyzes your data and generates insights automatically.

step3.title: Download the report
step3.desc: Download the finished report in PDF, PowerPoint or Word.

features.title: Key features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to generate professional financial reports.

adaptive.title: Adaptive analysis
adaptive.desc: Automatically detects data types and adapts the analysis to the financial context.

formats.title: Multiple formats
formats.desc: Export to PDF, PowerPoint and Word — whatever format your team needs.

charts.title: Automatic charts
charts.desc: Charts and tables generated automatically from your data.

templates.title: Professional templates
templates.desc: McKinsey, KPMG and Big4-level layouts applied automatically.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.desc: Analysis and recommendations generated by artificial intelligence.

multilang.title: Multi-language
multilang.desc: Reports in Portuguese and English, with automatic translation.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan for your team.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the platform.

items.q1: What file formats do you accept?
items.a1: We accept Excel files (.xlsx, .xls) and CSV. Just upload and the platform processes everything automatically.
items.a2: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We don't share or store your data beyond what's needed to generate the report.
items.q3: Do I need to install anything?
items.a3: No. CFO-AI works 100% in the browser. Just access the platform, log in and start generating reports.
items.a4: Yes. On the Professional and Enterprise plans you can customize colors, logos and template layouts to reflect your company identity.
items.q5: How long does it take to generate a report?
items.a5: On average, less than 60 seconds. Depending on data volume, it may take up to 2 minutes for more complex reports.
items.a6: Yes. No commitment. You can cancel or change your plan at any time, with no extra costs.

footer.ctaSubtitle: Start today and save hours every week.
